name: 名词性从句
subject: english
curriculum_points: 语言知识涵盖语音知识、词汇知识、语法知识、语篇知识和语用知识，是构成语言能力的重要基础。
所有的语言学习活动都应该在一定的主题语境下进行，即学生围绕某一具体的主题语境，基于不同类型的语篇，在解决问题的过程中，运用语言技能获取、梳理、整合语言知识和文化知识，深化对语言的理解。

excerpts.text: 语言知识涵盖语音知识、词汇知识、语法知识、语篇知识和语用知识，是构成语言能力的重要基础。
所有的语言学习活动都应该在一定的主题语境下进行，即学生围绕某一具体的主题语境，基于不同类型的语篇，在解决问题的过程中，运用语言技能获取、梳理、整合语言知识和文化知识，深化对语言的理解。

deep_snippets.text: Cambridge Primary English 0844 Curriculum Framework. Stage 3 Use a range of sentence structures and punctuation accurately to convey meaning and create particular effects • 3Wp1 Maintain accurate use of capital letters and full stops in showing sentences and check by reading own writing aloud • 3Wp2 Use a wider variety of sentence types including simple, compound and some complex sentences • 3Wp3 Continue to improve consistency in the use of tenses • 3Wp4 Vary sentence openings, e.g. with adverbials • 3Wp5 Recognise the use of the apostrophe to mark omission in shortened words, e.g. can’t, don’t • 3Wp6 Learn the basic conventions of speech punctuation and begin to use speech marks • 3Wp7 Use question marks, exclamation marks and commas in lists • 3Wp8 Collect examples of nouns, verbs and adjectives, and use the terms appropriately • 3Wp9 Identify pronouns and understand their function in a sentence • 3Wp10 Understand that verbs are necessary for meaning in a sentence • 3Wp11 Understand pluralisation and use the terms ‘singular’ and ‘plural’ • 3Wp12 Know irregular forms of common verbs • 3Wp13 Ensure grammatical agreement of pronouns and verbs in using standard English Use accurate spelling • 3Ws1 Use effective strategies to tackle segmenting unfamiliar words to spell, including segmenting into individual sounds, separating into syllables, using analogy, identifying known suffixes and prefixes, applying known spelling rules, visual memory, mnemonics • 3Ws2 Explore words that have the same spelling but different meanings (homonyms), e.g. form, wave • 3Ws3 Learn rules for addi

Cambridge Primary English 0844 Curriculum Framework. Stage 5 Use a range of sentence structures and punctuation accurately to convey meaning and create particular effects • 5Wp1 Use an increasing range of subordinating connectives • 5Wp2 Combine simple sentences and re-order clauses to make compound and complex sentences • 5Wp3 Begin to use the comma to separate clauses within sentences and clarify meaning in complex sentences • 5Wp4 Begin to set out dialogue appropriately, using a range of punctuation • 5Wp5 Identify prepositions and use the term preposition • 5Wp6 Extend understanding of the use of adverbs to qualify verbs, e.g. in dialogue • 5Wp7 Use apostrophes for both possession and shortened forms • 5Wp8 Spell and make correct use of possessive pronouns, e.g. their, theirs, my, mine Use accurate spelling • 5Ws1 Investigate the spelling of word-final unstressed vowels, e.g. the unstressed ‘er’ at the end of butter and unstressed ‘ee’ at the end of city • 5Ws2 Learn spelling rules for words ending in -e and -y, e.g. take/taking, try/tries • 5Ws3 Know rules for doubling consonants and investigate patterns in the use of single and double consonants, e.g. -full/-ful • 5Ws4 Use known spellings to work out the spelling of related words • 5Ws5 Use effective strategies for learning new spellings and misspelt words • 5Ws6 Identify ‘silent’ vowels in polysyllabic words, e.g. library, interest • 5Ws7 Investigate spelling patterns for pluralisation, e.g. -s, -es, -y/-ies, -f/-ves • 5Ws8 Extend earlier work on prefixes and suffixes, recognising that different spelling rules apply

EgAugNAL | 5-K | 62 Common Core State StandardS for enGLISH LanGUaGe artS & LIteraCy In HIStory/SoCIaL StUdIeS, SCIenCe, and teCHnICaL SUbjeCtS Language Standards K–5 l The following standards for grades K–5 offer a focus for instruction each year to help ensure that students gain adequate mastery of a range of skills and applications. Students advancing through the grades are expected to meet each year’s grade-specific standards and retain or further develop skills and understandings mastered in preceding grades. Beginning in grade 3, skills and understandings that are particularly likely to require continued attention in higher grades as they are applied to increasingly sophisticated writing and speaking are marked with an asterisk (*). See the table on page 30 for a complete list and Appendix A for an example of how these skills develop in sophistication. Kindergartners: Grade 1 students: Grade 2 students: Conventions of Standard english 1. Demonstrate command of the conventions of 1. Demonstrate command of the conventions of 1. Demonstrate command of the conventions of standard English grammar and usage when standard English grammar and usage when standard English grammar and usage when writing writing or speaking. writing or speaking. or speaking. a. Print many upper- and lowercase letters. a. Print all upper- and lowercase letters. a. Use collective nouns (e.g., group). b. Use frequently occurring nouns and verbs. b. Use common, proper, and possessive nouns. b. Form and use frequently occurring irregular c. Form regular plural nouns orally by adding /s/ c. Use singula

supplements.curriculum_md_raw:
# 名词性从句

## 基本信息
- **学科**: 英语
- **学段**: 高中
- **年级**: 高中10年级
- **章节**: 语法
- **知识点**: 名词性从句
- **课标版本**: 普通高中课程标准（2017年版2020年修订）

---

## 一、课标原文

### 1.1 内容要求
> （英语 10年级）名词性从句的内容要求。学生应理解名词性从句的基本概念，掌握基本方法，能运用所学知识解决简单的实际问题。

### 1.2 学业要求
> 学生能准确描述名词性从句的相关概念，能进行基本的运算和推理，能解决与名词性从句相关的实际问题，形成初步的英语思维和素养。

### 1.3 教学提示
> 教学时应注重从学生熟悉的生活情境入手，引导学生通过具体操作、观察、归纳等方式理解名词性从句的概念。注重知识的发生发展过程，帮助学生建立知识之间的联系。

---

## 二、教学目标

### 2.1 知识与技能
- 学生能够理解名词性从句的基本概念和原理
- 学生能够正确进行相关计算和推理
- 学生能够识别和描述相关的概念、现象或材料
- 学生能够理解名词性从句的基本概念和原理

### 2.2 过程与方法
- 学生经历通过自主探究和合作交流，掌握学习英语的方法
- 学生能够运用英语学科方法解决问题
- 学生能够在交流中表达自己的思路
- 学生经历通过自主探究和合作交流，掌握学习英语的方法

### 2.3 情感态度与价值观
- 学生感受英语与现实生活密切相关
- 学生体验英语探究的乐趣，树立学好英语的信心
- 学生养成认真细致、独立思考的学习习惯
- 学生感受英语与现实生活密切相关

---

## 三、教学重难点

### 3.1 教学重点
- 名词性从句的基本内容和基本方法
- 形成完整的知识体系结构
- 名词性从句的基本内容和基本方法
- 形成完整的知识体系结构

### 3.2 教学难点

- 建立知识之间的联系，实现知识的迁移应用

supplements.textbook_summary:
## 教材化讲解参考（由课标要点生成）

### 核心概念
名词性从句是英语学习中的重要知识点。教学时应围绕课标要点“语言知识涵盖语音知识、词汇知识、语法知识、语篇知识和语用知识，是构成语言能力的重要基础。”展开，先明确概念边界，再通过例子、图示、实验、语篇或案例帮助学生建立可迁移的理解。

### 学习路径
1. 情境导入：以真实语境和交际任务组织「名词性从句」教学，落实形式、意义、使用统一。
2. 探究建构：通过听说读写综合活动，让学生先理解语境，再操练语言形式，最后完成表达任务。
3. 应用迁移：围绕课标要点“语言知识涵盖语音知识、词汇知识、语法知识、语篇知识和语用知识，是构成语言能力的重要基础。”，设计输入理解、控制操练和真实输出任务。

### 例题设计方向
可设计一道“识别核心概念”的基础题，一道“解释现象或文本材料”的理解题，一道“迁移到真实情境”的应用题，并要求学生说明依据。

errors.description: 学习「名词性从句」时只记形式，不能在真实语境中表达意义。
受中文表达影响，忽略英语词序、搭配或语法一致性。

exercises.stem: Create two sentences in a real context to show how to use 名词性从句. Explain the meaning in Chinese.
exercises.answer: Sentences should fit the context and reflect: 语言知识涵盖语音知识、词汇知识、语法知识、语篇知识和语用知识，是构成语言能力的重要基础。

exercises.stem: Read a short dialogue and identify how 名词性从句 helps express meaning.
exercises.answer: The answer should explain form, meaning and use in context.

real_world: 围绕校园、家庭、兴趣、出行或节日话题，在真实交流中使用「名词性从句」。
